name_en: Code: 666261, 🎉MCM🎉 Camera Bag 📷 Visetos Klassik Crossbody Bag. As the name suggests, this Klassik crossbody bag is a main bag for creating a stylish look, completely made of classic Visetos material, designed for 🎁MCM🎁 fans. Dimensions: 22x15x8cm
